zh.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater於1405年出生在英國蘇格蘭Forfarshire林特拉騰。他於大約1436年與Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年10月25日在英國蘇格蘭班福爾德斯福德享年55歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾圖利福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater于1405年出生在英国苏格兰Forfarshire林特拉騰。他于大约1436年与Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1460年10月25日在英国苏格兰班福爾德斯福德享年55岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾圖利福。

nameMeanings.name: Ogilvy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ogilvie
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Oglesby  , a habitational name from the barony of Ogilvie in Glamis (Angus), whose name is probably Pictish, of uncertain origin and meaning.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater was born in 1405, in Lintrathen, Forfarshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. He married Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford about 1436, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 25 October 1460, in Deskford, Banffshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Turriff, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater est né en 1405, à Lintrathen, Forfarshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford environ 1436, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1460, à Deskford, Banffshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Turriff, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater wurde 1405 in Lintrathen, Forfarshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat um 1436 in Scotland Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1460 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Deskford, Banffshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Turriff, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater è nato il nel 1405 nel Lintrathen, Forfarshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford circa 1436, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1460, nel Deskford, Banffshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Turriff, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlaterは1405年にイギリススコットランドForfarshireリントラスンで生まれた。約1436年にスコットランドでLady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年10月25日にイギリススコットランドバンフシュアイアデスクフォードで55歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアトゥリッフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater(은)는 1405년 영국 스코틀랜드 Forfarshire 린트래테에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1436년 스컷랜드에서 Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 10월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 반프실르 데스k퍼드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 터리프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater nasceu em 1405, em Lintrathen, Forfarshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford aproximadamente 1436, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1460, em Deskford, Banffshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Turriff, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater родился в 1405 г. в местности линтрафен, Forfarshire, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford около 1436 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 25 октября 1460 г. в местности дескфорд, банффшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности туррифф, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Walter Ogilvy 1st of Deskford and Findlater nació en 1405, en Lintrathen, Forfarshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Se casó con Lady Margaretha Sinclair of Deskford aproximadamente 1436, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1460, en Deskford, Banffshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Turriff, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
